nasb.text: And when He had taken a cup and given thanks, He gave it to them, and they all drank from it.

esv.text: And he took a cup, and when he had given thanks he gave it to them, and they all drank of it.

cnv.text: 又拿起杯來，祝謝了就遞給門徒，他們都喝了。

ccb.text: 接着又拿起杯来，祝谢后，递给他们，他们都喝了。

csbs.text: 接着，他拿起杯来，祝谢了，递给门徒们。他们都喝了。
